headline: Transocean Strengthens Outlook With $1 Billion Equinor Deal
summary: RIG adds more than $1B to its backlog with Equinor through a seven-rig-year Norway drilling deal, boosting long-term revenue visibility from 2027.

headline: Valero Energy Corp (NYSE:VLO) Shows Strong Earnings Momentum and Technical Breakout Potential
summary: Valero Energy (VLO) shows explosive earnings growth with 374% quarterly EPS surge, perfect 10/10 technical rating, and strong momentum. A high-growth breakout candidate near 52-week highs with analyst upgrades.
